problem.title: Integer to English Words
problem.description: Convert a non-negative integer num to its English words representation.

example.output: "One Million Two Hundred Thirty Four Thousand Five Hundred Sixty Seven"
example.explanation: Process in groups of three digits from right: ones, thousands, millions, billions.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Recursive
solutions.description: Process the number in groups of three digits (thousands, millions, billions) from least significant to most significant, converting each group with a helper that handles values under 1000 using ones, teens, and tens lookup tables. Each non-zero group is prefixed with its scale word (Thousand, Million, Billion) before being prepended to the result. The key insight is that English number names have a regular three-digit repeating structure, so a single sub-1000 converter combined with scale suffixes handles all cases uniformly.
